spell.name: Divine Plagues
spell.text: Your deity sends wracking plagues. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. When you Cast the Spell, decide whether the disease inflicts the clumsy, enfeebled, or stupefied condition.

traits.name: Disease
traits.text: An effect with this trait applies one or more diseases. A disease is typically an affliction.

traits.name: Necromancy
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the necromancy school of magic, typically involving forces of life and death.

heightened.text: The divine plague disease gains the virulent trait. The condition value for the clumsy, enfeebled, or stupefied condition is 2 instead of 1.

defense.failure: The target is afflicted with divine plague at stage 1.
defense.critical_failure:
The target is afflicted with divine plague at stage 2.  
  
**Divine Plague** (disease) **Level** 1; **Stage 1** clumsy 1, enfeebled 1, or stupefied 1 (1 round); **Stage 2** slowed 1 and clumsy 1, enfeebled 1, or stupefied 1 (1 round); **Stage 3** clumsy 1, enfeebled 1, or stupefied 1 and the target can’t recover from the condition until they are cured (1 day)
